bead.title: migrate execute_bead_land.go to git.Command
bead.description: Split from timed-out ddx-65b88ae1. Migrate the 27 bare exec.Command("git"...) and exec.CommandContext(..."git"...) callsites in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_land.go to use cli/internal/git.Command (the wrapper from ddx-aa8a5fb3). Each: replace 'exec.CommandContext(ctx, "git", args...)' with 'git.Command(ctx, dir, args...)' where dir is the cmd.Dir the original code set (or the -C target). Import path: "github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/git".
bead.acceptance: grep -n 'exec\.Command(\s*"git"\|exec\.CommandContext(.*"git"' cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_land.go returns no matches. All existing execute_bead_land_test.go tests still pass. Build green.
